arts.ttl: Barca players wear T-shirts in support of injured Ter Stegen
arts.sum: Barcelona players showed their support for goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen ahead of Wednesday’s La Liga clash with Getafe at Montjuic. Inaki Pena has taken over from Marc-Andre ter Stegen for the time being but looks set to have competition soon from Wojciech Szczesny.

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal breakthrough led to Barcelona ending interest in Chelsea star
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has established himself as a world class player over the last 12 months, despite only being 17 years of age. Barcelona are incredibly thankful to have him, and his presence has also had an effect on their transfer business. arts.ttl: Will Barcelona Release the 125-Year Anniversary Kit?
arts.sum: The 2024-25 season will be the season to celebrate Barcelona's 125th anniversary and they will launch a special campaign and special collection.

arts.ttl: Ex-Barcelona manager Luis Enrique’s scathing opinion of Xavi Hernandez’s side revealed in documentary
arts.sum: Former treble-winning Barcelona manager Luis Enrique was full of praise for his former teammate Xavi Hernandez when the pair met in the Champions League last season. arts.ttl: Barcelona interested in signing Premier League star as successor for Robert Lewandowski
arts.sum: Barcelona have started to look at life after Robert Lewandowski. The Polish striker may still be one of the most prolific goalscorers in Europe, but he is now 36, meaning that his days at the top level will soon be coming to an end.
